author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

entry.title: Hymns, Carols & Songs - Lamb of God unblemished

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Hymns, Carols & Songs - Lamb of God unblemished
media:group.media:description:
Hymns on our organ from Trinity United Reformed Church, High Wycombe
- Join us for worship every Sunday #AllAreWelcome - Subscribe to receive notifications when we post new hymns and other items . - Like our hymns ❤️ or leave a comment sharing what they mean to you. 🙏 - Share this video with friends and family to spread the light of God's word. 🔄
Where to find us: https://goo.gl/maps/2TCLpBvVymaCcJeM6?coh=178571&entry=tt Website: https://www.trinity-urc.org.uk Podcasts: https://anchor.fm/trinitycoresend-1year-ago Twitter: https://twitter.com/trinity_urc Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/trinity_urc/ YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@TrinityHighWycombe What's on: https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/o/trinity-and-cores-end-united-reformed-churches-32072022553 Mastodon: https://mastodon.social/@trinityhighwycombe Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/trinityhighwycombe.bsky.social
Let the sounds of hymns wash over you and lift your spirit! 🎶
Listen as our organists bring these timeless songs of worship to life each Sunday to accompany our services. 🙏 As the powerful refrains fill the sanctuary, the soaring notes seem to break open the heavens as we glorify God in music.
Join us and add your voice. Our weekly services are open to all - come feel the awesome presence of the Holy Spirit moving through our music. 🙌
May the beauty of these holy hymns draw you closer to the divine light and fill your days with harmony. ⛪
#EveryTuesday #TuesdayInspiration
#Hymns #Worship #Music #Church #Organ #Choir #Jesus #God #Praise #scripture #faith #religion #christianity #gospelmusic #Singing #ChoralMusic #SacredMusic #Soul #Harmony #Reflection #Soothing #HolyHolyHoly #SoundsOfTheSpirit #ChurchOrgan #Pipes
Church Copyright Licence: 36750 Streaming Plus Licence: 133445 Music Reproduction Licence: 36750 Church Video Licence: 1294601 PPL Church Licence: 1824088 CLA Church Licence: 953431 PRS for Music Church Licence: 953424 OneLicense: 741270-A

Hymns on our organ from Trinity United Reformed Church, High Wycombe
- Join us for worship every Sunday #AllAreWelcome - Subscribe to receive notifications when we post new hymns and other items . - Like our hymns ❤️ or leave a comment sharing what they mean to you. 🙏 - Share this video with friends and family to spread the light of God's word. 🔄
Where to find us: https://goo.gl/maps/2TCLpBvVymaCcJeM6?coh=178571&entry=tt Website: https://www.trinity-urc.org.uk Podcasts: https://anchor.fm/trinitycoresend-1year-ago Twitter: https://twitter.com/trinity_urc Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/trinity_urc/ YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@TrinityHighWycombe What's on: https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/o/trinity-and-cores-end-united-reformed-churches-32072022553 Mastodon: https://mastodon.social/@trinityhighwycombe Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/trinityhighwycombe.bsky.social
Let the sounds of hymns wash over you and lift your spirit! 🎶
Listen as our organists bring these timeless songs of worship to life each Sunday to accompany our services. 🙏 As the powerful refrains fill the sanctuary, the soaring notes seem to break open the heavens as we glorify God in music.
Join us and add your voice. Our weekly services are open to all - come feel the awesome presence of the Holy Spirit moving through our music. 🙌
May the beauty of these holy hymns draw you closer to the divine light and fill your days with harmony. ⛪
#EveryTuesday #TuesdayInspiration

media:group.media:description:
